title: microstegium nudum subsp. japonicum
intro: Microstegium nudum subsp. japonicum, also known as Japanese Finger Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Japanese Finger Grass include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Japanese herbal medicine, Kampo.
